zh.lifeSummary: 當Elizabeth Willoughby於1384年出生在英國林可爾史爾維洛賀比 曼諾時，她的父親William Willoughby13歲，母親Lucy le Strange17歲。她於1402年與Henry de Beaumont在英國林可爾史爾福爾金哈姆結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和5個女兒的父母。她去世於1428年11月14日在英國林可爾史爾福爾金哈姆 煙雨 勞頓享年44歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Elizabeth Willoughby于1384年出生在英国林可爾史爾維洛賀比 曼諾时，她的父亲William Willoughby13岁，母亲Lucy le Strange17岁。她于1402年与Henry de Beaumont在英国林可爾史爾福爾金哈姆结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和5个女儿的父母。她去世于1428年11月14日在英国林可爾史爾福爾金哈姆 煙雨 勞頓享年44岁。

nameMeanings.name: Willoughby
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from any of various places called Willoughby, for example in Leicestershire, Lincolnshire, Nottinghamshire, and Warwickshire. They are named from an Old English +wilig ‘willow’ + Old Norse bȳ ‘farmstead, village’.

variants.name: Wilby
meanings: habitational name from any of the places called Wilby, in Suffolk, Norfolk, and Northamptonshire. The first placename is probably named from an Old English wilig ‘willow’ + Old English bēag ‘circle, ring’; the Norfolk placename derives from Old English wilig + bēag or Old Norse bý ‘farmstead, village’; the Northamptonshire placename derives from the Old Norse personal name Vili + bý.
Redmonds has demonstrated that in the parish of Hipperholme, and subsequently elsewhere in Yorkshire, Wilby occurs as a variant of Willoughby .

nameMeanings.name: Elizabeth
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: The usual spelling of   Elisabeth   in English. It is recorded in the medieval period, but was made popular by being borne by  Queen Elizabeth I  of England (  1533–1603 ). In the 20th century it again became extremely fashionable, partly because it was the name of  Elizabeth Bowes-Lyon  (  1900–2002 ), who in  1936  became Queen Elizabeth as the wife of King George VI, and after his death in  1952  achieved great public affection as Queen Mother for nearly half a century. Even more influentially, it is the name of her daughter  Queen Elizabeth II  (  b. 1926 ).

variants.name: Elisabeth
meanings: The spelling of Elizabeth used in the Authorized Version of the New Testament, and in most modern European languages. This was the name of the mother of John the Baptist (Luke 1:60). Etymologically, the name means ‘God is my oath’, and is therefore identical with Elisheba, the name of the wife of Aaron according to the genealogy at Exodus 6:23. The final element seems to have been altered by association with Hebrew shabbāth ‘Sabbath’.

en.lifeSummary: When Elizabeth Willoughby was born in 1384, in Willoughby Manor, Lincolnshire, England, her father, William Willoughby, was 13 and her mother, Lucy le Strange, was 17. She married Henry de Beaumont in 1402, in Folkingham, Lincolnshire, England. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 5 daughters. She died on 14 November 1428, in Folkingham with Laughton, Lincolnshire, England, at the age of 44.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Elizabeth Willoughby est née en 1384, à Willoughby Manor, Lincolnshire, Angleterre, son père, William Willoughby, avait 13 ans et sa mère, Lucy le Strange, avait 17 ans. Elle a épousé Henry de Beaumont en 1402, à Folkingham, Lincolnshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 5 filles. Elle est décédée le 14 novembre 1428, à Folkingham with Laughton, Lincolnshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 44 ans.

ko.Sempringham with Pointon and Birthorpe,: 영국 링코실르 젬프링함 위스 포인턴 앤드 비르소
ko.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Willoughby(이)가 1384년 영국 링코실르 윌루그h비 먼어에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 William Willoughby(은)는 13세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Lucy le Strange(은)는 17세였다. 그녀는 1402년 영국 링코실르 폴킨그함에서 Henry de Beaumont(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1428년 11월 14일 영국 링코실르 폴킨그함 위스 로그h턴에서 44세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Elizabeth Willoughby nasceu em 1384, em Willoughby Manor, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, William Willoughby, tinha 13 anos e sua mãe, Lucy le Strange, tinha 17 anos. Ela casou-se com Henry de Beaumont em 1402, em Folkingham, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 5 filhas. Ela faleceu em 14 de novembro de 1428, em Folkingham with Laughton, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, com 44 anos.

ru.Sempringham with Pointon and Birthorpe,: семпрингхам вит поинтон анд биртаурп, линколншир, Англия
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Elizabeth Willoughby родилась в 1384 г. в местности уиллоугби манор, линколншир, Англия, её отцу по имени William Willoughby было 13 лет, а матери, которую звали Lucy le Strange, 17. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Henry de Beaumont в 1402 г. в местности фолкингхам, линколншир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 5 дочерей. Она умерла 14 ноября 1428 г. в местности фолкингхам вит лотон, линколншир, Англия в возрасте 44 лет.

Se casó con Henry de Beaumont en 1402, en Folkingham, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 5 hijas. Murió el 14 de noviembre de 1428, en Folkingham with Laughton, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 44 años.
